summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing for Zuba House e-commerce Phase 2 features. All critical Stripe payment integration and push notification endpoints are working correctly with real API keys. Product listing endpoints fixed and working.
passed_tests: Root Endpoint - API server running correctly
API Health Check - Database connected, server healthy
Stripe Health Check - Configured with real keys, test mode active
Create Checkout Session - Successfully creates sessions with valid URLs
Get Checkout Status - Retrieves session status correctly
Register Push Token - Accepts and stores Expo push tokens
Send Push Notification - Sends notifications to registered devices
Broadcast Notification - Sends broadcast to multiple users
Validate Coupon Code - Returns proper validation responses
Validate Gift Card - Returns proper validation responses
Get All Products - Returns product list (empty in test DB)
Search Products - Handles product search queries
Get Featured Products - Returns featured product list
Get Sale Products - Returns sale/discounted products
action_item_for_main_agent: None - All requested backend endpoints are working correctly. Stripe integration with real keys confirmed working. Push notification system operational.
